plugin.name: YouTubeMusic
plugin.title: YouTube Music
plugin.desc: Browse, search, and stream YouTube Music to your Squeezebox players.
plugin.changes: Added Download yt-dlp button — downloads the correct binary for your platform directly into the plugin directory. No sudo required, no PATH issues. Supports Linux x86_64, aarch64, armv7l, macOS, and Windows.
plugin.creator: schmij97
